title: Not Enough Revives
body:
Ever wanted to have a chance at helping your friends when they just died? Well now you can, Not Enough Revives is a mod that allows you to do just that. Once a player dies they will be put into a knocked state where they will be allowed to choose between two options, call for help or bleed out. 

You have a set amount of time to help them before they succumb to they're injuries and have help them up which also takes a few seconds, in the knocked state a player will be unable to attack and will be able to crawl around. If you fall into water or even lava you will float to the surface, and if you also fall into the void you will be teleported to the nearest safe block while your knocked.

Knocked players will be glowing with an outline for a few seconds when calling for help, in which they will also make a sound thats directional and volume depends on the distance.

You have the ability to also also upload your very own audio to use as sounds, change the pitch aswell as change outline colors through the ingame.

There's a config if you wish to change any of the mods values.

[![Partner](https://i.imgur.com/Nzbs37x.png)](https://billing.kinetichosting.net/aff.php?aff=1386)
